description: Machine-readable source of truth mapping every geometry_diagnostics/1 metric to the FigOps figure-quality rubric.

tick_label_overlaps.rationale: Tick label collisions can prevent values or categories from being read.

tick_label_crowding.rationale: Dense tick labels are an advisory label-density issue unless readability is blocked.

artists_outside_axes.rationale: Data or required artists outside the intended axes can hide the plotted result.

artists_outside_figure.rationale: Required artists outside the figure boundary violate journal-safe geometry.

legend_data_collision.non_blocking_reason: Current implementation reports bbox-union overlap as context only; it is not an ink-accurate blocking gate.

axis_label_title_overlap.rationale: Axis labels overlapping titles can block figure readability.

figure_title_panel_title_overlap.rationale: Figure and panel title collisions can block title interpretation.

colorbar_overlap.rationale: Colorbar overlap can obscure labels, marks, or scale interpretation.

blank_area_ratio.rationale: Excessive blank area can indicate hidden data or a view that no longer shows the validated result.

point_annotation_overlaps.rationale: Point annotation overlaps can prevent labels or associated marks from being read.

artist_overlaps.rationale: General artist collisions can block interpretation of labels, marks, or annotations.

legend_internal_overlaps.rationale: Legend item collisions can make series identity unreadable.

marker_marker_overlaps.rationale: Severe marker pile-up can hide data visibility and distribution.

text_axis_edge_proximity.rationale: Text near the axis edge is an advisory label placement issue unless it blocks readability.

legend_marker_consistency.rationale: Legend marker/style mismatches affect visual hierarchy and series identification polish.

label_offset_consistency.rationale: Inconsistent point-label offsets affect panel balance and placement consistency.

point_label_skips.rationale: Skipped point labels are an advisory density/readability finding unless required labels disappear.

annotation_overlay_contrast.rationale: Annotation contrast is an advisory accessibility finding unless required text becomes unreadable.

font_size_token_drift.rationale: Font sizes below selected style or journal floors violate journal-safe geometry.

journal_compliance.rationale: Selected journal/style token violations are hard-gate journal-safe geometry findings.
